title: N2 closed both directions - Buffels Bay turnoff
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Reports have been...
bodyText:
Breaking News

GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Reports have been received of a vehicle that is on fire on the N2, near Buffels Bay turnoff, in the direction of Knysna.


> The N2 is currently closed in both directions for all vehicles.


Updates will be provided as received.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
